# Word Rumble

> Word Rumble is a free bubble word puzzle game. Swap colorful bubbles to form words, score points, and compete in adventure and multiplayer modes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Main menu with quick access to all game modes.
- [Play](/play): Singleplayer modes — Classic, Word Surge, and more.
- [Challenge](/challenge): Asynchronous multiplayer matches against other players.
- [Adventure](/adventure): Story-driven adventure levels with unique mechanics.
- [Daily Challenge](/daily): A new puzzle every day with star-based coin rewards.
- [Shop](/shop): Spend coins on power-ups, themes, and unlockables.
- [Statistics](/statistics): Player stats, high scores, and multiplayer record.
- [How to play](/info): Tutorial and game rules.

## Optional

- [Settings](/settings): Language, audio, and app preferences.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
